crime.value: Espionage - German spy network stealing British naval secrets
crime.quote: It was his talents which had first recommended him for the English mission, the most important mission of all

victim.value: British state/military - targeted for their naval intelligence and war preparations

closed_world.value: Von Bork's cliff-top house and immediate surroundings during wartime
closed_world.quote: Von Bork, like some wandering eagle, had perched himself four years before

culprit_and_motive.value: Von Bork - German agent stealing British secrets for Kaiser's war effort
culprit_and_motive.quote: A remarkable man this Von Bork--a man who could hardly be matched among all the devoted agents of the Kaiser

resolution.value: Holmes captures Von Bork through deception, taking him to Scotland Yard
resolution.quote: you will go with us in a quiet, sensible fashion to Scotland Yard

investigator.value: Sherlock Holmes working undercover to expose the German spy network

suspect_architecture.value: Multiple German agents in a spy network: Von Bork (primary), Baron Von Herling (superior), plus compromised agents James, Hollis, Steiner
suspect_architecture.quote: Jack James... doing time in Portland... Then there was Hollis... Then... Steiner... they've got him

red_herring.value: Holmes disguised as American agent Altamont creates false identity to infiltrate German spy ring
red_herring.quote: Well, so was Jack James an American citizen... It cuts no ice with a British copper

clue_fairness.value: Reader sees the systematic capture of German agents (James, Hollis, Steiner) before Von Bork realizes the pattern
clue_fairness.quote: Steiner is the fifth man you've lost since I signed on with you, and I know the name of the sixth

social_world.value: German diplomatic and espionage hierarchy vs British intelligence operations during wartime
social_world.quote: Baron Von Herling, the chief secretary of the legation... devoted agents of the Kaiser

reveal_mechanic.value: Holmes reveals his true identity after successfully completing his undercover operation as Altamont
reveal_mechanic.quote: Stand with me here upon the terrace... you are joining us with your old service

investigator_wound.value: Holmes facing what may be his final case as age and changing times threaten his relevance
investigator_wound.quote: Good old Watson! You are the one fixed point in a changing age... it may be the last quiet talk

_meta.title: ebook sir arthur conan doyle his last bow
